name: Artmage Masterwork -Succession-
name_jp: アルトメギア・マスターワーク－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>継</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>承</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－
desc: During the Main Phase: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field, including an "Artmage" monster, and if a card is in the Field Zone, that monster gains 500 ATK. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 3 "Artmage" cards with different names in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Artmage Masterwork -Succession-" once per turn.
eff: During the Main Phase: Fusion Summon 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field, including an "Artmage" monster, and if a card is in the Field Zone, that monster gains 500 ATK. During your Main Phase: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 3 "Artmage" cards with different names in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Artmage Masterwork -Succession-" once per turn.

action: Sends from your hand to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
Uses cards in the hand as Fusion Materials
Uses cards on the player's field as Fusion Materials
Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
